# Creodrop

> Creodrop is a managed Drupal hosting platform. Launch a fully functional Drupal site in under two minutes with no server configuration required.

Creodrop provides managed Drupal-as-a-Service hosting for non-technical users and developers. Sites run on isolated Docker containers with automatic SSL, custom domain support, and database backups.

## Documentation

- [Welcome](https://creodrop.com/docs/welcome): Overview of Creodrop and getting started steps
- [Creating Your Account](https://creodrop.com/docs/creating-your-account): Sign up with Google, GitHub, or email
- [Creating a Site](https://creodrop.com/docs/creating-a-site): Launch a Drupal site with the creation wizard
- [Plans and Tiers](https://creodrop.com/docs/plans-and-tiers): Compare Starter, Standard, Pro, and Developer plans
- [Dashboard Overview](https://creodrop.com/docs/dashboard-overview): Manage all your sites from one place
- [Site Details](https://creodrop.com/docs/site-details): Monitor site health, backups, and quick actions
- [Site Settings](https://creodrop.com/docs/site-settings): Configure custom domains and site information
- [Custom Domains](https://creodrop.com/docs/custom-domains): Connect your own domain with automatic SSL
- [Backups](https://creodrop.com/docs/backups): Create and manage database backups
- [Developer Tier](https://creodrop.com/docs/developer-tier): Multi-environment hosting with SSH, git, and Drush access
- [Account Settings](https://creodrop.com/docs/account-settings): Profile, password, and account management

## Plans

- **Starter**: 0.5 CPU, 256 MB RAM, 2 PHP workers, 32 MB upload -- for personal sites and portfolios
- **Standard**: 1 CPU, 512 MB RAM, 4 PHP workers, 64 MB upload -- for small businesses
- **Pro**: 2 CPU, 1 GB RAM, 8 PHP workers, 128 MB upload -- for high-traffic sites
- **Developer**: 2 CPU, 2 GB RAM, 8 PHP workers, 128 MB upload -- with dev/stage/prod environments, SSH, git, and Drush access

All plans include a 14-day free trial, automatic SSL, custom domain support, and database backups.

## Links

- [Homepage](https://creodrop.com)
- [Blog](https://creodrop.com/blog)
- [Roadmap](https://creodrop.com/roadmap)
- [Documentation](https://creodrop.com/docs)
